cases.name: return kind labels for all nodes
cases.cypher: match (n) return labels(n)

cases.name: filter any node by string property equality
cases.cypher: match (n) where n.name = '1234' return n

cases.name: filter a typed node using an inline property map
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1 {name: "SOME NAME"}) return n

cases.name: return all nodes
cases.cypher: match (s) return s

cases.name: filter nodes matching a kind disjunction
cases.cypher: match (s) where (s:NodeKind1 or s:NodeKind2) return s

cases.name: cross-product filter where two nodes share a property value
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1), (e) where n.name = e.name return n

cases.name: filter any node by string property equality (s binding)
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name = '1234' return s

cases.name: filter node by string starts-with prefix
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name starts with '123' return s

cases.name: filter node by string ends-with suffix
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name ends with 'NAME' return s

cases.name: filter node where a property is not null
cases.cypher: match (n) where n.system_tags is not null return n

cases.name: filter typed node using coalesce with contains predicate
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where coalesce(n.system_tags, '') contains 'admin_tier_0' return n

cases.name: filter typed node by array property size
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where size(n.array_value) > 0 return n

cases.name: filter typed node where array property overlaps a literal list
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where ['DES-CBC-CRC', 'DES-CBC-MD5', 'RC4-HMAC-MD5'] in n.arrayProperty return n

cases.name: filter typed node where array property contains one of several scalar values
cases.cypher: match (u:NodeKind1) where 'DES-CBC-CRC' in u.arrayProperty or 'DES-CBC-MD5' in u.arrayProperty return u

cases.name: filter node carrying two kind labels simultaneously
cases.cypher: match (s) where s:NodeKind1 and s:NodeKind2 return s

cases.name: paginate results using SKIP and LIMIT
cases.cypher: match (n) return n skip 5 limit 10

cases.name: order results by node ID descending
cases.cypher: match (s) return s order by id(s) desc

cases.name: filter isolated nodes with no adjacent edges
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s)-[]-() return s

cases.name: filter nodes where node ID appears in another node's array property
cases.cypher: match (s), (e) where id(s) in e.captured_ids return s, e

cases.name: filter typed node with starts-with using a function call as the prefix
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.distinguishedname starts with toUpper('admin') return n

cases.name: optional match returns results even when the pattern may be absent
cases.cypher: optional match (n:NodeKind1) return n

cases.name: double-negation filter selects nodes where a property is null
cases.cypher: match (n) where not n.property is not null return n

cases.name: filter nodes where array property equals an empty array literal
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.prop = [] return s

cases.name: filter node by string contains predicate
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name contains '123' return s

cases.name: filter node using negated starts-with predicate
cases.cypher: match (s) where not s.name starts with 'XYZ' return s

cases.name: filter node using negated contains predicate
cases.cypher: match (s) where not s.name contains 'XYZ' return s

cases.name: filter node using negated ends-with predicate
cases.cypher: match (s) where not s.name ends with 'XYZ' return s

cases.name: filter node where string property starts with another property
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name starts with s.other return s

cases.name: filter node where string property contains another property
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name contains s.other return s

cases.name: filter node where string property ends with another property
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name ends with s.other return s

cases.name: filter nodes where a datetime property is null
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at is null return s

cases.name: project an arithmetic expression on a node property
cases.cypher: match (s) return s.value + 1

cases.name: filter typed node using datetime arithmetic against epoch seconds
cases.cypher: match (u:NodeKind1) where u.pwdlastset < (datetime().epochseconds - (365 * 86400)) and not u.pwdlastset IN [-1.0, 0.0] return u limit 100

cases.name: filter node using coalesce equality on a named property
cases.cypher: match (n) where coalesce(n.name, '') = '1234' return n

cases.name: filter typed node using three-argument coalesce equality against an integer
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where coalesce(n.a, n.b, 1) = 1 return n

cases.name: filter typed node using two-property coalesce that resolves to null
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where coalesce(n.a, n.b) = 1 return n

cases.name: filter typed node with coalesce on the right-hand side of equality
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where 1 = coalesce(n.a, n.b) return n

cases.name: project a compound arithmetic expression dividing a shifted property
cases.cypher: match (s) return (s.value + 1) / 3

cases.name: filter node using toLower equality and return distinct results
cases.cypher: match (s) where toLower(s.name) = '1234' return distinct s

cases.name: filter typed node where a property contains a toUpper result
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.distinguishedname contains toUpper('test') return n

cases.name: filter typed node where a property equals a toUpper result (no match)
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.distinguishedname = toUpper('admin') return n

cases.name: filter typed node where a property ends with a toUpper result (no match)
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.distinguishedname ends with toUpper('com') return n

cases.name: filter typed node where toString of a property appears in a literal list
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where toString(n.functionallevel) in ['2008 R2', '2012', '2008', '2003'] return n

cases.name: filter typed node where toInt of a property appears in a literal integer list
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where toInt(n.value) in [1, 2, 3, 4] return n

cases.name: filter typed node using datetime arithmetic against epoch milliseconds
cases.cypher: match (u:NodeKind1) where u.pwdlastset < (datetime().epochmillis - 86400000) and not u.pwdlastset IN [-1.0, 0.0] return u limit 100

cases.name: filter node where a datetime property equals the current date
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = date() return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals date minus a duration
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = date() - duration('P1D') return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals date plus a duration string
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = date() + duration('4 hours') return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals a literal date value
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = date('2023-4-4') return s

cases.name: filter node where a datetime property equals the current datetime
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = datetime() return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals a literal datetime value
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = datetime('2019-06-01T18:40:32.142+0100') return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals the current local datetime
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = localdatetime() return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals a literal local datetime value
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = localdatetime('2019-06-01T18:40:32.142') return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals the current local time
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = localtime() return s

cases.name: filter node where a property equals a literal local time value
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.created_at = localtime('4:4:4') return s

cases.name: filter node using a negated parenthesized equality predicate
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s.name = '123') return s

cases.name: filter node using negated 2-hop path existence
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s)-[]->()-[]->() return s

cases.name: filter node using negated directed edge pattern with property constraints
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s)-[{prop: 'a'}]->({name: 'n3'}) return s

cases.name: filter node using negated incoming edge pattern with property constraints
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s)<-[{prop: 'a'}]-({name: 'n3'}) return s

cases.name: return id of node where negated kind filter removes typed results
cases.cypher: match (s) where not (s)-[]-() return id(s)

cases.name: filter node where id appears in a literal integer list
cases.cypher: match (s) where id(s) in [1, 2, 3, 4] return s

cases.name: filter typed node where array property contains one of three scalar values
cases.cypher: match (u:NodeKind1) where 'DES-CBC-CRC' in u.arrayProperty or 'DES-CBC-MD5' in u.arrayProperty or 'RC4-HMAC-MD5' in u.arrayProperty return u

cases.name: filter node where an empty array literal equals a property (reversed operands)
cases.cypher: match (s) where [] = s.prop return s

cases.name: filter node where a property is not equal to an empty array
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.prop <> [] return s

cases.name: filter node using negated equality to an empty array
cases.cypher: match (s) where not s.prop = [] return s

cases.name: filter typed node using property equality with literal-then-property concatenation
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) match (m:NodeKind2) where m.distinguishedname = 'CN=ADMINSDHOLDER,CN=SYSTEM,' + n.distinguishedname return m

cases.name: filter typed node using property equality with property-then-literal concatenation
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) match (m:NodeKind2) where m.distinguishedname = n.distinguishedname + 'CN=ADMINSDHOLDER,CN=SYSTEM,' return m

cases.name: filter typed node using property equality with two literal strings concatenated
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) match (m:NodeKind2) where m.distinguishedname = '1' + '2' return m

cases.name: order results by two properties with mixed sort directions
cases.cypher: match (s) return s order by s.name, s.other_prop desc

cases.name: two sequential optional matches where only the anchor node is required
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) optional match (m:NodeKind2) where m.distinguishedname starts with n.distinguishedname optional match (o:NodeKind2) where o.distinguishedname <> n.distinguishedname return n, m, o

cases.name: filter typed node with compound hasspn enabled and not-ends-with checks
cases.cypher: match (u:NodeKind1) where u.hasspn = true and u.enabled = true and not '-502' ends with u.objectid and not coalesce(u.gmsa, false) = true and not coalesce(u.msa, false) = true return u limit 10
